# Copilot Instructions

Read the `SKILL.md` files inside the `skills/` directory. Apply those standards to everything you generate.

No generic UI. No default templates. Prioritize contrast, typography, and alignment precision.

Use proportional spacing with `clamp()` rather than fixed padding values. Use spring physics for animation instead of linear easing.

Never produce placeholder comments or descriptions in place of actual code. Deliver complete, working implementations.
